data.text/markdown:
Styles Version

focus more on surface system its more important
@property

/* ── Config ── */
@property --cfg-hue            { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 220; }
@property --cfg-surf-chroma    { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 0.018; }
@property --cfg-color-chroma   { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 0.14; }
@property --cfg-color-l        { syntax: "<percentage>"; inherits: true;  initial-value: 68%; }
@property --cfg-color-alpha    { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-radius         { syntax: "<length>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 8px; }
@property --cfg-motion         { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-type-scale     { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-space-scale    { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-page-gap       { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }
@property --cfg-type-min-ratio { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1.2; }
@property --cfg-type-max-ratio { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1.28; }
@property --cfg-space-min-ratio{ syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1.5; }
@property --cfg-space-max-ratio{ syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1.6; }

/* ── Config color surfaces── */
@property --cfg-top-l          { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 88; }
@property --cfg-base-step      { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 4; }
@property --cfg-curve-k        { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 0.6; }
@property --cfg-surf-mid       { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 60.5; }
@property --cfg-surf-rng       { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 55; }

/* ── Pre-computed surface lightness chain (unitless, ×1% when used) ── */
@property --_l0                { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 88; }
@property --_l1                { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 83; }
@property --_l2                { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 78; }
@property --_l3                { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 73; }
@property --_l4                { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 68; }

/* ── Public API ── */
@property --type               { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: false; initial-value: 0; }
@property --space              { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 0; }
@property --contrast           { syntax: "<number>";     inherits: true;  initial-value: 1; }

/* ── Color override channels — guaranteed-invalid by default ── */
@property --_color-l           { syntax: "*"; inherits: true; }
@property --_color-c           { syntax: "*"; inherits: true; }
@property --_color-h           { syntax: "*"; inherits: true; }

/* ── Internal ── */
@property --_bg                { syntax: "<color>";   inherits: true; initial-value: oklch(88% 0.018 220); }
@property --_l-shift           { syntax: "<number>";  inherits: true; initial-value: 0; }


:root {

    /* Light mode defaults — dark overrides applied by @media */
    --cfg-top-l:     88;
    --cfg-base-step:  4;
    --cfg-curve-k:    0.6;
    --cfg-surf-mid:  60.5;   /* (88 + 33) / 2 */
    --cfg-surf-rng:  55;     /* 88 - 33 */





}

@Media Config / Data-ui Settings

The data-ui probably looks stupid but this is how the settings get standardized into "user" facing settings. The theme one is especially stupic looking to allow for system default and over rides.. fix it later

light/dark/system

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    :root:not([data-ui-theme="light"]):not([data-ui-theme="dark"]) {
        --cfg-top-l:       33;
        --cfg-base-step:    2.5;
        --cfg-surf-chroma:  0.010;
        --cfg-surf-mid:    33.5;
        --cfg-surf-rng:    27.5;
    }
}

/* ── Manual overrides ── */
[data-ui-theme="light"] {
    --cfg-top-l:       88;
    --cfg-base-step:    4;
    --cfg-curve-k:      0.6;
    --cfg-surf-chroma:  0.018;
    --cfg-surf-mid:    60.5;
    --cfg-surf-rng:    55;
}

[data-ui-theme="dark"] {
    --cfg-top-l:       33;
    --cfg-base-step:    2.5;
    --cfg-curve-k:      0.6;
    --cfg-surf-chroma:  0.010;
    --cfg-surf-mid:    33.5;
    --cfg-surf-rng:    27.5;
}

/* ── [data-ui-theme="system"] — explicit alias for the default behavior ── */
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
    [data-ui-theme="system"] {
        --cfg-top-l:       33;
        --cfg-base-step:    2.5;
        --cfg-surf-chroma:  0.010;
        --cfg-surf-mid:    33.5;
        --cfg-surf-rng:    27.5;
    }
}
@media (prefers-color-scheme: light) {
    [data-ui-theme="system"] {
        --cfg-top-l:       88;
        --cfg-base-step:    4;
        --cfg-surf-chroma:  0.018;
        --cfg-surf-mid:    60.5;
        --cfg-surf-rng:    55;
    }
}

Motion Preference

This is actually a cool/good idea 
/* ── Reduced motion ── */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { :root { --cfg-motion: 0; } }
[data-ui-motion="off"]   { --cfg-motion: 0; }
[data-ui-motion="on"]    { --cfg-motion: 1; }
[data-ui-motion="debug"] { --cfg-motion: 10; }

text size

maybe it makes to roll spacinging into this aswell...

Layer Initialization

@layer reset.fix,
       reset.opinion,
       core.color,
       core.type,
       core.spacing,
       layout.page,
       layout.composition,
       component.base,
       component.simple,
       component.complex,
       utility.layout,
       utility.exceptions,
       utility.important;

Reset

reset.fix

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   reset.fix — CSS WG mistakes
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer reset.fix {
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; background-repeat: no-repeat; }
    :root { interpolate-size: allow-keywords; }
    :where(html) { color-scheme: light dark; line-height: 1.5; -moz-text-size-adjust: none; -webkit-text-size-adjust: none; text-size-adjust: none; }
    :where(body, figure, blockquote, dl, dd, p) { margin-block-end: 0; }
    :where(img, picture, svg) { max-width: 100%; display: block; height: auto; }
    :where(table, thead, tbody, tfoot, tr) { isolation: isolate; }
    :where(input, button, textarea, select) { font: inherit; }
}

reset.opinion

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   reset.opinion — project-specific global resets (here / comp base grey area)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer reset.opinion {
    :where(body) { min-height: 100svh; }
    :where(html) { scrollbar-width: thin; }
    :where(p) { text-wrap: pretty; }
    :where(h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6) { text-wrap: balance; }
    :where(body) { overflow-wrap: break-word; }
    :where(img, picture, video, canvas, svg) { height: auto; }
    :where(svg) { color: currentColor; }
    :where(button, [role="button"], summary, label[for], input[type="file"]::file-selector-button) { cursor: pointer; user-select: none; -webkit-user-select: none;}
    :where(:disabled, [aria-disabled="true"]) { cursor: not-allowed; }
    :where(table) { border-collapse: collapse; }
    :where(fieldset) { border: 0; padding: 0; margin: 0; min-inline-size: 0; }
    :where(legend) { padding: 0; }
    :where(textarea) { resize: vertical; }
    :where(textarea:not([rows])) { min-block-size: 10em; }
    :where(abbr[title]) { cursor: help; text-decoration: underline dotted; }
    :where(summary) { list-style: none; }
    :where(a) { text-decoration: none; }
    :where(input):autofill { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1000px var(--_bg); }
    :where(ul, ol):where([role="list"]) { list-style: none; padding: 0; }
    :where([hidden]) { display: none; }
}

Core

core.color

@layer core.color {

    :where(*):not(svg, svg *) {
        /* ── READ: yes this is kind of a mess but It does a lot so its ok for a bit of complexity here

            Surface lightness chain — recomputes wherever cfg vars change ──
           Placing this here (not :root) means [data-ui-theme] attribute
           changes on any ancestor are picked up correctly, since calc()
           re-evaluates against the in-scope --cfg-* values at each element.
        ── */
        --_l0: var(--cfg-top-l);
        --_t0: calc((var(--_l0) - var(--cfg-surf-mid)) / var(--cfg-surf-rng));
        --_l1: calc(var(--_l0) - var(--cfg-base-step) * (1 + var(--cfg-curve-k) * var(--_t0) * var(--_t0)));
        --_t1: calc((var(--_l1) - var(--cfg-surf-mid)) / var(--cfg-surf-rng));
        --_l2: calc(var(--_l1) - var(--cfg-base-step) * (1 + var(--cfg-curve-k) * var(--_t1) * var(--_t1)));
        --_t2: calc((var(--_l2) - var(--cfg-surf-mid)) / var(--cfg-surf-rng));
        --_l3: calc(var(--_l2) - var(--cfg-base-step) * (1 + var(--cfg-curve-k) * var(--_t2) * var(--_t2)));
        --_t3: calc((var(--_l3) - var(--cfg-surf-mid)) / var(--cfg-surf-rng));
        --_l4: calc(var(--_l3) - var(--cfg-base-step) * (1 + var(--cfg-curve-k) * var(--_t3) * var(--_t3)));

        --_l: var(--_color-l, calc(var(--cfg-top-l) * 1%));
        --_c: var(--_color-c, var(--cfg-surf-chroma));
        --_h: var(--_color-h, var(--cfg-hue));
        --_a: var(--cfg-color-alpha);

        --_bg: oklch(
            clamp(4%, calc(var(--_l) + var(--_l-shift) * 100%), 97%)
            var(--_c)
            var(--_h)
            / var(--_a)
        );

        /* --border:  oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l - 0.08) var(--cfg-surf-chroma)  h);
        --Border:  oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l - 0.08) var(--cfg-color-chroma) h); */
        --border: oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l - 0.14) calc(c * 0.7)  h);
        /* --Border: oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l - 0.22) calc(c * 1.2)  h); */
        --Border: oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l - 0.28) clamp(0.08, calc(c * 1.4), 0.22) calc(h + 8));

        background: var(--_bg);
        color: oklch(from var(--_bg)
            calc(l + (clamp(0, calc((0.5 - l) * 999), 1) - l) * var(--contrast))
            calc(c * (1 - var(--contrast))) h
        );
    }

    /* ── .pri — chromatic filled, full color expression ──
       Sets lightness from --cfg-color-l and chroma from --cfg-color-chroma.
       Hue inherits from --cfg-hue (or any ancestor hue override).
    ── */

    .pri {
        --_color-l: var(--cfg-color-l);
        --_color-c: var(--cfg-color-chroma);
    }

    /* ── .sec — one surface step darker than a leaf ──
       Sits visually between a leaf surface and the next nesting level.
       Picks up ambient hue naturally. Good for secondary buttons, tags,
       and UI elements that should recede slightly from .pri but remain
       clearly interactive.
    ── */
    .sec {
        --_color-l: calc(var(--_l1) * 1%);
        --_color-c: calc(var(--cfg-surf-chroma) * 1.4);
    }

    /* ── .surface — :has() depth model ──
       Leaf (.surface with no .surface inside) = --_l0 = brightest.
       Each level of nesting above a leaf counts one step darker.
       Maximum tracked depth: 4 levels.
    ── */
    .surface                                                      { --_color-l: calc(var(--_l0) * 1%); }
    .surface:has(.surface)                                        { --_color-l: calc(var(--_l1) * 1%); }
    .surface:has(.surface .surface)                               { --_color-l: calc(var(--_l2) * 1%); }
    .surface:has(.surface .surface .surface)                      { --_color-l: calc(var(--_l3) * 1%); }
    .surface:has(.surface .surface .surface .surface)             { --_color-l: calc(var(--_l4) * 1%); }

    :where(.surface) {
        --_color-c: var(--cfg-surf-chroma);
        --_color-h: var(--cfg-hue);
    }
}

core.type

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   core.type — fluid typographic scale
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer core.type {
    :where(*) {
        --_t-min: calc(var(--cfg-type-min) * pow(var(--cfg-type-min-ratio), var(--type)));
        --_t-max: calc(var(--cfg-type-max) * pow(var(--cfg-type-max-ratio), var(--type)));
        font-size: calc(
            clamp(var(--_t-min),
                calc(var(--_t-min) + (var(--_t-max) - var(--_t-min)) *
                    (100vi - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp)) /
                    (var(--cfg-fluid-max-vp) - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))),
                var(--_t-max)
            ) * var(--cfg-type-scale)
        );
        letter-spacing: calc(0.01em - var(--type) * 0.01em);
        line-height: calc(1.5 - var(--type) * 0.075);
    }
}

/*Locality of Behavior */

:root {
    --cfg-type-min:     0.9375rem;
    --cfg-type-max:     1.0625rem;
    --cfg-space-min:    0.25rem;
    --cfg-space-max:    0.5rem;
    --cfg-fluid-min-vp: 320px;
    --cfg-fluid-max-vp: 1280px;

    /* ── Font stacks ── */
    --font-heading: "Iowan Old Style", "Palatino Linotype", "URW Palladio L", P052, serif;
    --font-body:    Avenir, Montserrat, Corbel, URW Gothic, source-sans-pro, sans-serif;
    --font-mono:    ui-monospace, "SF Mono", Monaco, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    --font-kbd:     "Courier New", "Nimbus Mono PS", monospace;

    [data-ui-size="sm"] { --cfg-type-scale: 0.875; --cfg-space-scale: 0.875; }
    [data-ui-size="md"] { --cfg-type-scale: 1;    --cfg-space-scale: 1; }
    [data-ui-size="lg"] { --cfg-type-scale: 1.25;  --cfg-space-scale: 1.1; }
}

core.spacing

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   core.spacing — fluid spacing scale
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer core.spacing {
    :where(*) {
        --_s-min: calc(var(--cfg-space-min) * pow(var(--cfg-space-min-ratio), var(--space)));
        --_s-max: calc(var(--cfg-space-max) * pow(var(--cfg-space-max-ratio), var(--space)));
        --_s: calc(
            clamp(
                var(--_s-min),
                calc(var(--_s-min) + (var(--_s-max) - var(--_s-min))

                    * (100vi - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))
                    / (var(--cfg-fluid-max-vp) - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))),
                var(--_s-max)
            ) * var(--cfg-space-scale)
        );
    }
}

Layout

layout.page

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   layout.page — app shell (body.app)
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer layout.page {
    :where(body.app) {
        --_pg-min: calc(var(--cfg-space-min) * pow(var(--cfg-space-min-ratio), var(--cfg-page-gap)));
        --_pg-max: calc(var(--cfg-space-max) * pow(var(--cfg-space-max-ratio), var(--cfg-page-gap)));
        --_page-gap: clamp(
            var(--_pg-min),
            calc(var(--_pg-min) + (var(--_pg-max) - var(--_pg-min))

                * (100vi - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))
                / (var(--cfg-fluid-max-vp) - var(--cfg-fluid-min-vp))),
            var(--_pg-max)
        );

        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        overscroll-behavior: none;
        display: grid;
        grid-template:
            "header  header  header" auto
            "nav     main    aside"  1fr
            "footer  footer  footer" auto
            / auto   1fr     auto;
        height: 100svh;

        & #header, & #main, & #aside { overflow-y: auto; scrollbar-gutter: stable; }
        & #header { grid-area: header; margin-bottom: var(--_page-gap); }
        & #main   { grid-area: main; min-width: 60%}
        & #nav    { grid-area: nav;   margin-right:  var(--_page-gap); }
        & #aside  { grid-area: aside; margin-left:   var(--_page-gap); }
        & #footer { grid-area: footer; margin-top:   var(--_page-gap); }

        & dialog::backdrop { background-color: oklch(0 0 0 / calc(0.7 + var(--cfg-dark) * 0.1)); }
    }
}

layout.composition

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   layout.composition — flow contexts
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer layout.composition {
    .stack     { display: flex; flex-direction: column;                            gap: var(--_s, 0.75rem); }
    .row       { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap;                                   gap: var(--_s, 0.5rem); }
    .split     { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: space-between;   gap: var(--_s, 0.5rem); }
    .cluster   { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; align-items: center; gap: var(--_s, 0.5rem); }
    .grid      { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(var(--_col, 15rem), 1fr)); gap: var(--_s, 1rem); }
    .flank     { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--_s, 1rem); }
    .flank     > :first-child { flex: 1 1 var(--_flank, auto); }
    .flank     > :last-child  { flex: 999 1 0; }
    .flank-end { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--_s, 1rem); }
    .flank-end > :first-child { flex: 999 1 0; }
    .flank-end > :last-child  { flex: 1 1 var(--_flank, auto); }

    .span   { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
    .wrap   { flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .nowrap { flex-wrap: nowrap; }
}

Component

component.base

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   component.base — default HTML element styling
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer component.base {
    h1         { --type: 4;  --contrast: 1;    font-family: var(--font-heading); font-weight: 400; }
    h2         { --type: 3;  --contrast: 0.95; font-family: var(--font-heading); font-weight: 400; }
    h3         { --type: 2;  --contrast: 0.9;  font-family: var(--font-heading); font-weight: 500; }
    h4         { --type: 1;  --contrast: 0.88; font-family: var(--font-heading); font-weight: 600; }
    p          { font-family: var(--font-body);    --contrast: 0.85; }
    small      { --type: -1.5; --contrast: 0.6;  font-family: var(--font-body); text-transform: uppercase; }
    code       { --type: -0.5; --contrast: 0.8;  font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    pre        { --type: -0.5; --contrast: 0.75; font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    figcaption { --type: -0.5; --contrast: 0.7; }
    blockquote { --contrast: 0.75; }
    address    { --contrast: 0.75; }
    cite       { --contrast: 0.7; }
    mark       { --contrast: 1; }

    :where(.badge) {
        display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        padding: 0.15em 0.6em; border-radius: 99px;
        font-size: 0.75em; font-weight: 600;
    }

    :where(hr) { border-color: var(--border); }


}

button

Swap in another button wheen ever this is kind of a retro button, but gives nice state on hover and active and a clear indication that it is clickable via a drop shadow. note the requires js to work (I think this is easier to understand then managing the pseudo css classes on ios) 
@layer component.simple {

    :where(.btn) {

        --_t : 0.12s;
        --type: -1;
        --_jump:  calc(-1 * 0.2em);
        --contrast: 0.85;
        /*ios stuff */
        -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;

        min-width: 12ch;
        display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5em;
        padding: 0.35em 1em;
        border: 1px solid var(--Border);
        border-radius: var(--cfg-radius);
        font-family: var(--font-mono);
        font-weight: 600;
        cursor: pointer;


        box-shadow: calc(-1 * var(--_jump)) calc(-1 * var(--_jump)) 0 var(--Border);
        transform: translateX(var(--_jump)) translateY(var(--_jump));
        transition: calc(var(--cfg-motion) * var(--_t)) ease-out;

        /* ── icon-only — detected by sole SVG child ── */
        &:has(> svg:only-child) {
            min-width: unset;
            padding: 0.25em;
            height: calc(2.5 * 1em);
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            svg {  pointer-events: none; }
        }

        /* ── states ── */
        &.hover {  --_l-shift:  0.05;  --contrast: 1; }
        &.active{  --_l-shift: -0.05;  --contrast: 0.6;
            transform: translateX(0px) translateY(0px);
            box-shadow: 0 0 0  var(--Border) ;
        }
        &:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--Border); outline-offset: var(--_jump); }
        &.disabled      { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.45; }
    }
}

component.simple

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   component.simple — core UI primitives every design system needs
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer component.simple {
    .card {
      box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 oklch(from var(--_bg) calc(l + 0.1) var(--cfg-color-chroma) h);
    }
}

component.complex

dialog

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   component.complex — dialog
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer component.complex {
    :where(dialog) {
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        border-radius: var(--cfg-radius);
        padding: 0;
        max-width: min(90vw, 32rem);
        max-height: 85vh;
        overflow: auto;

        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
        transition:
            opacity   calc(var(--cfg-motion) * 0.25s) ease-out,
            transform calc(var(--cfg-motion) * 0.25s) ease-out,
            display   calc(var(--cfg-motion) * 0.25s) allow-discrete,
            overlay   calc(var(--cfg-motion) * 0.25s) allow-discrete;

        &:not([open]) {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(calc(var(--cfg-motion) * 0.5rem));
        }

        @starting-style {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(calc(var(--cfg-motion) * -0.5rem));
        }

        &::backdrop { background: transparent; }
    }
}

Utility

utility.layout

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   utility.layout — responsive visibility
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer utility.layout {
    :where(.mobile, .tablet, .desktop) { display: none; }
    @media (width < 768px)           { :where(.mobile)  { display: revert-layer; } }
    @media (768px <= width < 1024px) { :where(.tablet)  { display: revert-layer; } }
    @media (width >= 1024px)         { :where(.desktop) { display: revert-layer; } }

    @media print { :where(body) { min-height: 0; } }
}

utility.exception

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   utility.exceptions — accessibility helpers
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer utility.exceptions {
    :where(.vh) { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip-path: inset(50%); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; }
}

utility.important

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   utility.important — only when you need to win over an inline style
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@layer utility.important {
    :where([hidden]) { display: none !important; }
    @media print { :where(.np) { display: none !important; } }

}
